subject: Annual wellness exam confirmed — Buddy — July 30 at 10:00 AM
snippet: Buddy's annual wellness exam is confirmed for July 30 at 10:00 AM.
bodyText: Dear Pet Owner, Buddy's annual wellness exam and vaccinations are confirmed for Wednesday, July 30, 2026 at 10:00 AM at Paws & Claws Veterinary Clinic, 750 Park Blvd. The appointment will take approximately 45 minutes. Please fast your pet for 2 hours prior to the appointment.

subject: Grooming appointment — Buddy — July 31 at 1:00 PM
snippet: Buddy's grooming appointment is scheduled for Thursday July 31 at 1:00 PM.
bodyText: Hi there! This is a reminder that Buddy's grooming appointment (bath, haircut, nail trim) is scheduled for Thursday, July 31, 2026 at 1:00 PM at Fluffy's Grooming Salon, 120 Maple Street. The session will take approximately 2 hours. Please pick up no later than 3:30 PM.

extractedEvent.title: Buddy's grooming appointment
extractedEvent.description: Bath, haircut, nail trim. Pickup by 3:30 PM.

subject: Boarding reservation confirmed — August 1-3
snippet: Buddy's boarding stay is confirmed August 1-3. Drop off after 8 AM, pickup before 6 PM.
bodyText: Dear Pet Owner, Buddy's boarding reservation is confirmed for August 1-3, 2026 at Happy Paws Boarding, 800 Riverside Drive. Drop-off: Saturday August 1 after 8:00 AM. Pick-up: Monday August 3 before 6:00 PM. Please bring your pet's food, medications, and favorite toys. Vaccination records are on file.

extractedEvent.title: Buddy boarding drop-off
extractedEvent.description: Drop off Buddy, bring food, meds, and toys

subject: Prescription heartworm medication ready for pickup
snippet: Buddy's heartworm medication is ready for pickup at Paws & Claws.
bodyText: Dear Pet Owner, Buddy's heartworm prevention medication (Heartgard Plus, 6-month supply) is ready for pickup at Paws & Claws Veterinary Clinic, 750 Park Blvd. Business hours are Mon-Fri 8 AM - 7 PM, Sat 9 AM - 5 PM. This prescription expires in 30 days.

subject: Dog training class — Saturdays starting August 8
snippet: Buddy's beginner obedience class starts August 8. Saturdays 9:00-10:00 AM.
bodyText: Hi! We're excited to have Buddy join our Beginner Obedience class starting Saturday, August 8, 2026. Classes run every Saturday from 9:00 AM to 10:00 AM for 6 weeks at K9 Obedience Training Center, 55 Training Lane. Please bring high-value treats and a 6-foot leash. No retractable leashes please.
